boundaries.title_guess: Lake District: Coniston, Wast Water & Grasmere (continues from previous window)

evidence.excerpt: The Gondola brought us back... Dry stone wall at Coniston.
Tuesday 2nd May. We left at 9.10. We drove over Wrynose Pass... camped at Boot in Eskdale
WEDNESDAY 3 MAY 1995, White Moss House, Rydal Water

boundaries.title_guess: Wales: Upper Cantref Farm, Brecon (May half-term)

evidence.excerpt: Troutbeck is a very pretty village... At 4.30 we set off for home.
Saturday May 27th. We left, the 7 of us at 8.20... only arrived at Upper Cantref Farm at 12.00.

boundaries.mixed_detail: A_0150_L ends the Lake District trip ('At 4.30 we set off for home'); A_0150_R begins the Upper Cantref Farm half-term trip at the heading 'Saturday May 27th'. Break falls between the upper paragraph (Wordsworth/Dove Cottage notes) and the dated 'Saturday May 27th' line.

evidence.excerpt: We got home, showered the children... it was a super half-term camping trip.
Saturday 24th June. We left at 9.05 for Northamptonshire... We arrived at Belton-in-Rutland *** at 11.45.

boundaries.mixed_detail: A_0152_R contains a non-trip local note first ('Sunday June 18 ... Middleton Hall for Mary Cohen's afternoon concert' - a day out, not a van trip) and then the trip departure 'Saturday 24th June. We left at 9.05 for Northamptonshire.' The trip start is the 'Saturday 24th June' line.

boundaries.title_guess: Spain: Picos de Europa, Santiago, Galicia, Portugal & Salamanca

evidence.excerpt: we ate at a coaching inn in Uppingham & returned home in the sun.
11am Tuesday July 25th. Simon, Eve, Thomas, Peter, John & Charles set off for Spain via Venetia & Southampton... We motored to Castro Urdiales.

boundaries.mixed_detail: A_0154_L opens with a non-trip local note ('Sunday July 2nd' - supper/concert on Malvern common) and then the Spain departure 'Tuesday July 25th. ... set off for Spain'. The trip start is the '11am Tuesday July 25th' line.

boundaries.title_guess: Notebook front-matter & index (Log 3 / Book 3, opens after Spain)

evidence.excerpt: Tues 14th 1995. We set off from Portsmouth for Birmingham at 4.40. pm.
Kirby 86 Westfield Rd, Edgbaston Birmingham... August 31st 1995. Log 3
1. Bromyard. Farnham 1995 / Hartley Wintney  2. London  3. Beauchamps Gloucester 1996 ... (handwritten index list)

boundaries.title_guess: Bromyard: Kate & Jamie's farm (also Farnham/Hartley Wintney visit)

evidence.excerpt: August 31st 1995. ... Simon & Eve, Thomas 15, William 13, John 8, Charles 6, left for Bromyard, Kate & Jamie's farm.
We left for Beauchamp at 1.0. ... Saturday 9th September. Simon, Eve, Peter, John & Charles left for Charity's (Hatty's) christening

boundaries.title_guess: London: Pickett's Lock, V&A, British Museum (via Hartley Wintney & Farnham)

evidence.excerpt: On the way we passed through Hartley Wintney... On to Farnham... We got home about 7pm.
Friday October 22nd. The seven of us set off for London at 10.20. We arrived at Pickett's lock

boundaries.mixed_detail: A_0171_L top continues/ends a Farnham/Hartley Wintney weekend ('We got home about 7pm'); then the dated 'Friday October 22nd. The seven of us set off for London' begins the London trip. Break falls at 'Friday October 22nd'. (The Farnham/Hartley Wintney material may itself be a separate short trip that opened in book pp.1-2, but I cannot see its start within this window.)

boundaries.title_guess: Beauchamp & Gloucester: John's cello course (Deerhurst, Odda's Chapel)

evidence.excerpt: We are driving home up the motorway. ETA 7.50.
9th April 1996... 8.30. We set off for Beauchamps for John to go on his first 'cello course.

boundaries.mixed_detail: A_0172_L ends the London trip ('driving home up the motorway. ETA 7.50.'); A_0172_R begins the 1996 cello-course trip at '9th April 1996'. Break falls at the '9th April 1996' heading. Date discontinuity: Oct 1995 -> April 1996.

boundaries.title_guess: Calver Mill (Peak District) via Tickhill/Doncaster (continues past window)

evidence.excerpt: April 15. ... John's concert was at 2.30... Home for supper.
Sat Apl 20. We set off at 9.30. S, E, P, J, C, Daniela Fischer... arrived at Tickhill near Doncaster... On through Doncaster to Calver Mill.

boundaries.mixed_detail: A_0174_L ends the cello-course trip ('April 15... Home for supper'); A_0174_R begins a new Calver Mill/Doncaster trip at 'Sat Apl 20'. Break falls at the 'Sat Apl 20' heading.

open_at_end: trip starting A_0174_R (Sat Apl 20, Tickhill/Doncaster -> Calver Mill, April 1996) appears to continue past this window
notes: Physical page numbers in this window are unreliable: two notebooks overlap in the scan (book 2 numbering runs alongside book 3, which restarts at p.1 at A_0170_R after the 'Log 3' front-matter at A_0168). I segmented chiefly on dated headings and explicit departures/returns. The Lake District trip (window start) continues from the previous window. Non-trip local concert notes appear inline on A_0152_R (Middleton Hall, June 18) and A_0154_L (Malvern common, July 2) before the respective trip departures, hence those pages are flagged mixed. A_0168-A_0170_L is notebook front-matter/index (non_trip). The Farnham/Hartley Wintney visit at top of A_0171_L may belong to a short trip whose start (book pp.1-2) is not fully visible; flagged with lower confidence.
